mapper.insert: INSERT INTO products ( category_id, product_name, description, base_price, discount_rate, is_display, created_at ) VALUES ( #{categoryId}, #{productName}, #{description}, #{basePrice}, #{discountRate}, #{isDisplay}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
INSERT INTO product_options ( product_id, option_type, option_name, extra_price, max_flavor_count ) VALUES ( #{productId}, #{optionType}, #{optionName}, #{extraPrice}, #{maxFlavorCount} )
INSERT INTO store_products ( store_id, product_id, is_sold_out ) VALUES ( #{storeId}, #{productId}, FALSE )
mapper.select: SELECT p.product_id AS productId, p.category_id AS categoryId, c.category_name AS categoryName, p.product_name AS productName, p.description AS description, p.base_price AS basePrice, p.discount_rate AS discountRate, p.is_display AS isDisplay FROM products p INNER JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.category_id WHERE p.product_id = #{productId}

SELECT option_id AS optionId, product_id AS productId, option_type AS optionType, option_name AS optionName, extra_price AS extraPrice, max_flavor_count AS maxFlavorCount FROM product_options WHERE product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY option_id ASC
SELECT store_id FROM store_products WHERE product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY store_id ASC
SELECT product_id, product_name, product_price, product_category, product_status FROM head_product WHERE product_status != 'DELETED' ORDER BY product_id DESC
SELECT product_id, product_name, product_price, product_category, product_status, product_description FROM head_product WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND product_status != 'DELETED'
mapper.update: UPDATE head_product SET product_name = #{updateDTO.productName}, product_price = #{updateDTO.productPrice}, product_category = #{updateDTO.productCategory}, product_status = #{updateDTO.productStatus}, product_description = #{updateDTO.productDescription}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE product_id = #{productId}
UPDATE head_product SET product_status = 'DELETED', updated_at = NOW() WHERE product_id = #{productId}
